"'''Who's Who in Rogue Squadron'''" was an article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 59|''Star Wars Insider'' 59]]. Written by [[Jason Fry]], it covered the history of forty-five [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Wraith Squadron]]. It was illustrated by [[Scott Roller]].

*''Rogue Squadron''
*''[[Wraith Squadron]]''
*The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65]]
